turns.npc_response: Figure it out, make assumptions if you have to, I don't pay you to make excuses, I pay you to deliver results.

turns.npc_response: Let me see what you've got so far, but don't think this is going to buy you an extension, I still expect a complete report by the end of the day.

turns.npc_response: Finally, now let's see if it's even worth the overtime you put in, I expect it to be flawless and comprehensive, no mistakes, no omissions.
I'll review it now, and I better not find any errors or gaps, you're lucky I didn't dock your pay for the delay, consider this a one-time warning.
Don't call me "boss", my name is Mr. Johnson, and I expect you to use it, now let's get down to business and see if your report is up to par.
